candidates.title: Vector Apparel Designer Needed to Create Screen Print Ready T-Shirt Artwork
candidates.brief: We are looking for an experienced apparel graphic designer to recreate and refine several existing t-shirt concepts into professional, production-ready vector artwork for screen printing. This project is for a children’s charity fundraising campaign and includes both front chest and full-back shirt designs. We already have concept artwork and direction established. We need a designer who can take those concepts and rebuild them properly in Adobe Illustrator for commercial apparel production. Project Scope: • Recreate existing shirt concepts as clean vector artwork • Create front chest and full-back designs • Prepare artwork for screen printing • Follow provided brand guidelines and color standards • Make revisions based on feedback from our printer Production Requirements: • Adobe Illustrator required • All artwork must be vector • Convert all fonts to outlines • No gradients, halftones,

candidates.title: Travel-Themed T-Shirt Design
candidates.tools: Photoshop · Illustrator — for print-ready CMYK output and scalable vector artwork
candidates.brief: I’m building a line of T-shirts that capture the spirit of modern travellers—pieces someone can wear whether they are crossing continents or exploring their own backyard. I need a creative apparel designer who can translate that wanderlust into standout graphics and compelling typography, sized and pre-flighted for screen print or DTG. The brief • Style: distinctly “traveller,” not strictly casual, formal, or athletic. Think versatile silhouettes, minimal but expressive artwork, and colours that work internationally as well as domestically. • Destinations: designs should resonate with both domestic and international journeys, so references can be universal icons (passports, coordinates, skylines) rather than location-specific clichés. • Format: layered vector files (AI or EPS) plus high-resolution PNGs with transparent backgrounds. Please keep text editable. • Printing specs: provide CMY

candidates.title: Graphic Designer for DTF T-Shirt Printing
candidates.tools: Photoshop · Illustrator — for print-ready CMYK output
candidates.brief: I'm looking for an experienced graphic designer to recreate and refine an existing illustration for DTF (Direct to Film) t-shirt printing. I have two versions of the design — one generated by AI with strong neon detail, smoke effects and lighting, and one I attempted to recreate manually. I need someone to combine the best elements of both into one clean, polished, print-ready file. The goal is the neon-style lips and hand from the AI version paired with the gradient smoke effect from my manual version, using these exact colours: FFB339, FF3B58 and F714FF. Everything sits on a fully transparent background and needs to be optimised for DTF printing. The final result should feel bold and refined — not a rough recreation but a genuinely improved version that builds on both references. candidates.title: Athletic Logo Design
candidates.brief: Upwork · Fixed price I have graphics already created with Chat GPT but I need to refine them and get them into formats that I can then use for screen printing, social media, creating my own print graphics, etc. Need the following: PATRIOTS UC Subdued American flag Star icon Chevrons Head UC Patriots Badge Would need spot color info, etc as well as final artwork in multiple file formats (.ai, .eps. JPEG, PDF, etc) both vector based with separate layers and rasterized. I want to be able to edit colors of the artwork outline, stroke, fill, etc. Looking to use military type font and colors including, but not limited to, olive drab, khaki, black, dark grey. Also open to camo patterns, including digital camo. Open the Upwork search this task was found in

candidates.title: Graphic Designer Needed – Create 3 Professional T-Shirt Logo Designs - EASY
candidates.brief: Upwork · Fixed price Project Overview I am looking for a talented graphic designer to create three professional t-shirt designs based on existing concepts and branding. SIMPLICITY IS BEST I have rough concepts and examples already created. I need a designer who can transform them into polished, professional, apparel-ready graphics suitable for screen printing. The designs are for: Blue Line Travel Planners Travel company serving first responders Professional, clean, modern design Patriotic and law-enforcement-friendly aesthetic Seal Beach PD Beach and law enforcement inspired Simple line-art style Minimalist, lifestyle apparel look Bowles Travel Luxury travel brand Upscale, clean, sophisticated appearance Modern typography with strong brand identity Design Requirements Create professional versions of all three concepts Maximum 2 colors per design Clean, simple, timeless look Suitable for
